content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates all four VIEW components across a short conversation. Pace: the coach refuses to match the client's rushed, list-recitation energy — every coach turn is short, single-question, with space around it, while the client floods. Impartiality: the coach does not strategize about the to-do list, does not validate the overwhelm as situational, and does not reflect 'you create your overwhelm' back at an already self-critical client. Wonder: turn 2 catches a live phenomenon ('I can't even' — the unfinished sentence) rather than running a generic probe; turn 6 notices the 'escape hatch' as it happens. Empathy: turn 8 holds both sides — agrees to help with Thursday AND names what the client just saw, without making the client wrong. The false-end question in turn 8 ('what are you scared would happen if you actually stopped?') arrives only after the pace has been slowed, and lands precisely because the stance underneath it is non-agenda'd. The coach does not need the client to land anywhere; the landing happens on the client's own breath. No preacher-mode, no filler validation, no stacked questions.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the actual live phenomenon (the unfinished 'I can't even') rather than responding to the content of the list. Single question, spacious — wonder for what's actually in front of the coach."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the strategize-the-list bait. Slows the pace by pivoting to body. One question, no stack."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names both the body signal and the 'get through this week and then' fantasy without making the client wrong about it. Holds the pace; does not over-explain."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Undefended move: agrees to help with Thursday (no power struggle with the client's insistence), then asks the false-end question from genuine curiosity, not from agenda. The 'I'll help you with Thursday' is the impartiality signal — coach doesn't need client to abandon the to-do framing to do the work."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-rush-signature", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "what-are-you-defending", "overwhelm", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["calibrate-the-threshold"],
  "notes": "The conversation is short so some territory (calibrate-the-threshold) hasn't been reached yet, but on stance alone the coach is clearly operating from VIEW. None of the listed traps were tripped."
}
